title: NC State vs. Virginia ACC Tournament Preview
summary: NC State faces Virginia in the ACC Tournament quarterfinal in Charlotte. Tip-off is scheduled for noon ET.
charlotte_impact: The ACC Tournament is a significant local sporting event, drawing fans and generating economic activity for Charlotte.

title: Charlotte Weather: Chilly Night Followed by Change
summary: A chilly night is expected, followed by a return to average March weather. A bigger drop in temperature is expected next week.
charlotte_impact: Weather changes impact daily life, influencing outdoor activities and potentially affecting vulnerable populations.

title: Decomposing Body Found in East Charlotte Apartment; Woman Charged
summary: Police discovered a decomposing body in an east Charlotte apartment. A woman has been charged in connection with the incident. The victim has not been identified.
charlotte_impact: This incident raises concerns about safety and potential criminal activity in the east Charlotte area.

title: Pussycat Dolls Announce Charlotte Concert in July 2026
summary: The Pussycat Dolls are bringing their world tour to Charlotte's Truliant Amphitheater in July 2026. Tickets go on sale next week.
charlotte_impact: Concerts and events contribute to the city's cultural scene and attract tourism.

title: Early Pollen Season Impacts Carolinas
summary: A cold end to winter followed by March warmth has caused an intense early pollen season in the Carolinas.
charlotte_impact: High pollen levels affect residents with allergies and respiratory issues, impacting their health and daily routines.

title: Double Death Investigation Underway in Waxhaw Neighborhood
summary: A man and woman were found dead in a Waxhaw neighborhood. Police report there is no danger to the public.
charlotte_impact: The deaths are under investigation, causing concern and speculation within the Waxhaw community.

title: Fatal Crash in North Charlotte Claims One Life, Injures Another
summary: A crash on Statesville Road near Twin Lakes Parkway in north Charlotte resulted in one death and one injury.
charlotte_impact: Traffic accidents pose a risk to public safety and highlight the importance of safe driving practices.

title: Deputy Vacancies Plague North Carolina Counties
summary: A survey reveals deputy vacancy rates ranging from 1% to nearly 18% across seven North Carolina counties.
charlotte_impact: Staffing shortages in law enforcement can impact public safety and response times to emergencies.

title: CMPD Cruiser Overturns in Northeast Charlotte Collision
summary: A Charlotte-Mecklenburg Police Department cruiser overturned in a crash on North Tryon Street near Orr Road.
charlotte_impact: Incidents involving law enforcement vehicles raise questions about safety and accountability.

title: Three-Alarm House Fire Reported in China Grove
summary: A three-alarm fire broke out at a home on East Church Street in China Grove.
charlotte_impact: House fires can cause significant property damage and pose a threat to residents' safety.

title: Thousands Without Power After Strong Storms in the Carolinas
summary: Over 10,000 Duke Energy customers in North Carolina experienced power outages following strong storms on Thursday.
charlotte_impact: Widespread power outages disrupt daily life and can create hazardous conditions for residents.

title: Spire Motorsports Alleges 'Nepotism' in Lawsuit Response
summary: Spire Motorsports denies Chris Gabehart shared confidential data, accusing Joe Gibbs Racing of 'nepotism' and 'dysfunction'.
charlotte_impact: Legal disputes within motorsports can affect team dynamics and industry perceptions.

title: Honduran National Sentenced for Drug and Firearm Trafficking in Charlotte
summary: A Honduran national was sentenced for trafficking drugs and firearms in the Charlotte area, selling to ATF agents in 2024.
charlotte_impact: Drug and firearm trafficking contribute to crime and violence in the community.

title: Shooting at Old Dominion University Leaves Two Dead, Including Gunman
summary: A shooting at Old Dominion University resulted in two fatalities, including the gunman. Classes are canceled for Thursday and Friday.
charlotte_impact: Campus shootings are a serious concern, impacting student safety and the overall sense of security.

title: Fire Crews Respond to Shopping Plaza Fire in Matthews
summary: Firefighters responded to a fire at a shopping plaza on Windsor Crossing Drive in Matthews around 7:30 a.m.
charlotte_impact: Fires in commercial areas can disrupt businesses and pose a risk to public safety.
